en: So you mean...? / So basically...?
notes: "So..." で始めて自分の理解を述べる形が自然

en: Am I understanding this right?
notes: "Is my understanding correct?" はフォーマル

en: Is that right? / Am I right?
notes: "Right?" だけでも確認として機能する

en: Are you sure about that? / Is that really okay?
notes: "Are you sure?" は確認の万能表現

en: So that's settled? / Are we good?
notes: "Are we good?" はカジュアルに最終確認する時

en: Today, right? / It's today, right?
notes: 文末に "right?" を付けるだけで確認になる

en: Tomorrow, right?
notes: 同上。"right?" は日本語の「〜だよね？」に相当

en: We're meeting at 7, right?
notes: "right?" の付加疑問が自然

en: Are you talking about me? / Is that about me?
notes: "Wait, me?" だけでもカジュアルに通じる

en: Were you joking earlier? / Was that a joke?
notes: "You were kidding, right?" でも

en: Are you serious? / Do you mean that?
notes: "Are you for real?" はカジュアル

en: Can you say that slowly? / Slow down.
notes: "Could you speak more slowly?" は丁寧

en: I didn't catch the last part.
notes: "catch" =「聞き取る」。"I didn't catch that." は聞き返しの定番

en: Is this enough?
notes: シンプルで直接的

en: Do you still need it? / Is it still needed?
notes: "it" を具体的な名詞に置き換えると自然

en: Should I go now?
notes: "Should I...?" は指示を確認する基本形

en: Should I wait here? / Want me to wait here?
notes: "Want me to...?" はカジュアルな確認

en: It's B, not A? / Wait, not A but B?
notes: "not A but B" の語順で覚える

en: Is that what you mean? / Do you mean it that way?
notes: "Is that what you're saying?" も自然

en: Am I getting this wrong? / Am I misunderstanding?
notes: "Are you sure you're not mixing things up?" で相手に向けても

en: We're on the same page, right?
notes: "on the same page" =「認識が一致している」。定番イディオム

jp: 今日中って今日の夜まで？
en: By today, you mean by tonight?
notes: "by" =「〜までに」。期限を表す前置詞

en: Did you send it already? / Has it been sent?
notes: "yet" を使うなら "Have you sent it yet?"

en: Is there still time? / Can we still make it?
notes: "make it" が「間に合う」の定番

en: Is this mine to do? / Am I supposed to do this?
notes: "supposed to" =「〜することになっている」

en: Should I leave it as is? / Is it fine like this?
notes: "as is" =「そのまま」

en: No changes needed? / We're keeping it as is?
notes: "No changes?" だけでも通じる

en: Was that a compliment?
notes: ストレートに聞く表現

jp: それって大丈夫なやつ？
en: Is that okay? / Is that safe?
notes: 文脈で "okay"（許容）か "safe"（安全）を使い分ける

en: I don't have to go? / Is it okay if I don't go?
notes: "have to" の否定で「〜しなくてもいい」

en: Can I eat first? / Mind if I start eating?
notes: "Mind if I...?" は許可を求める丁寧な表現

en: Can I use this? / Mind if I use this?
notes: 同上

en: What did you say? / Sorry, what?
notes: "Sorry?" だけでも聞き返しとして機能する（イギリス英語寄り）

en: Are we done? / Can we wrap up?
notes: "wrap up" =「終わりにする」。ビジネスでもよく使う

en: Is that still going on? / Are we still on that?
notes: "going on" =「続いている」

en: Did someone call me? / Were you calling me?
notes: "Did you say my name?" でも

en: Do we need that right now? / Is that urgent?
notes: "urgent" =「緊急の」

en: This is the right place, right?
notes: "right?" を文末に付ける確認パターン
